channel.title: Ingolstadt Liebfrauenmünster on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Ingolstadt Liebfrauenmünster on Share Hub

item.title: Ingolstadt Travel Guide | Danube City 1 Hour from Munich (2025)
item.description: Ingolstadt is known as Audi’s headquarters but its historic center is far richer. A city on the Danube River with medieval walls, the Bavarian Army Museum and an unexpected Frankenstein connection. 1 hour from Munich.
